summary: A unit test in the internal/prompter package timed out: TestHuhPrompterMultiSelectWithSearchPersistence (the subtest selections_persist_after_changing_search_query) failed because form.Run() did not complete within the test's time limit.
root_cause: The test TestHuhPrompterMultiSelectWithSearchPersistence/selections_persist_after_changing_search_query failed because form.Run() did not complete in time (test timeout).

evidence.reason: Shows the top-level test that failed and that it ran for ~5s before failing.

evidence.quote: 2026-05-06T06:56:30.9716210Z         huh_prompter_test.go:478: form.Run() did not complete in time
evidence.reason: Concrete failure message from the test: form.Run() timed out (the immediate cause of the test failure).
Shows how the tests were invoked (useful to reproduce locally with same flags).
Indicates the job failed because of the failing test (non-zero exit code).

suggested_fix: Investigate why form.Run() blocks in huh_prompter_test.go at line 478: reproduce the failing subtest locally using the same command (go test -race -tags=integration ./...), add logging or assertions around form.Run to see where it stalls, and either fix the blocking behavior or increase the test timeout/adjust synchronization so form.Run() can complete reliably.
